li.task-list-item[data-task=\"u\"]::befo.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
li.task-list-item[data-task=\"u\"]::befo.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"w\"]::afte.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
li.task-list-item[data-task=\"w\"]::afte.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"w\"]::befo.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
li.task-list-item[data-task=\"w\"]::befo.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

li[data-line=\"0\"]::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
li[data-line=\"0\"]::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

mark.background: rgb(255, 200, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0 0.866667 1 / 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0 0.866667 1 / 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.language-js::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace
